channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: Riding High After I.P.O., SpaceX Will Buy A.I. Start-Up for $60 Billion
item.description: SpaceX exercised its option to acquire Cursor in an all-stock deal, bolstering Elon Musk’s ambitions in artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mac and Gregory Schmidt

media:content.media:credit: Jordan Vonderhaar for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: The deal to acquire Cursor signals how Elon Musk is delving further into A.I. and expanding SpaceX from its main businesses of building rocket ships and offering satellite internet service.
